_meta.description: List users who are pending onboarding (status=STAGED). Returns each person's name, primary email, and start date if visible in the table. Returns an empty list if no staged users exist — this is expected on the current free-tier org.
notes: URL filter ?filters=status=STAGED tested live — returns 0 results on current org.
STAGED_OFFBOARDING is a separate status for users scheduled for removal.
If the org has users onboarded with a future start date, they appear here.
Table columns observed: YeshID account owner, Primary email, Directory synced, YeshID status, # of applications. Start date is not a visible column — may appear in person detail.

pagination-footer.resolveHint: Footer below the data table. Shows '0-0 of 0' when no results.

people-table-body.resolveHint: Table body containing person rows. Each row has: avatar initials, name, primary email, directory sync status, YeshID status chip, app count.

chain.note: Filter to users in STAGED (pending onboarding) status.
Wait for the Vue data table to mount.
Allow Vue reactivity to settle after navigation.
Capture total count. '0-0 of 0' means no staged users.
Read all staged-user rows. Each row: name (col 1), primary email (col 2), directory sync (col 3), status chip (col 4). Start date not in table — would require navigating to each person's detail page.

chain.empty_message: No users are currently pending onboarding (status=STAGED). If you expected staged users, verify their onboarding was scheduled for a future start date.
chain.note: Return count and list. If count is 0, return empty list with explanation.
